```js title=main.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./a.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  a: () => (a),
  b: () => (b)
});
const a = 3;
const b = 3;


},
"./answer.js"(__unused_rspack_module, exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
const res = __rspack_require("./lib.js");
exports.test = function () {
	res;
};


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _answer__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./answer.js");

_answer__rspack_import_0.test;


},
"./lib.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  a: () => (/* reexport safe */ _a_js__rspack_import_0.a),
  b: () => (/* reexport safe */ _a_js__rspack_import_0.b)
});
/* import */ var _a_js__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./a.js");



},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
